emails.subject: Crestar Document - Final Versions
emails.body: Crestar Document Final Versions Dan, further to my voice mail. Please find following changes as required to close off documents. Document 1: c:\temp\2000-87crfm.doc Change document as follows: 3) In the event that the Customer does not deliver the Designated Quantity, Company will purchase "Replacement Gas". "Replacement Gas Quantity" shall be the difference between the Designated Quantity less the actual volume delivered to the Company by the Customer multiplied by the "Replacement Gas Price". "Replacement Gas Price" means the Midpoint price published on each calendar day that the replacement gas is purchased under the heading "Daily Price Survey" in the Citygates Chicago LDCs, e-users section of Gas Daily or if a calendar day is not a business day then the Replacement Gas Price for such calendar day will be the Daily Midpoint price published on the next succeeding business day. In the event that the Replacement Gas Price exceeds the Contract Price, Customer will pay company the difference. If Replacement Gas is less than the Contract Price then Company shall pay customer the difference. 4) In the event that the Company fails to take the Designated Quantity then Customer shall use all reasonable commercial efforts to sell such volume and Company shall pay the customer the Contract Price plus any reasonable expenses that the Customer incurred to sell this gas. Document 2: c\temp\2000-89 crfm.doc Change this document as follows: Delete paragraph 2 in OTHER TERMS: Call me if there are any questions regarding this note. I can be reached at 3-1587. 3206B BT

emails.subject: Re: Crestar Document - Final Versions
emails.body: Re: Crestar Document Final Versions Please review the language in 87crfm. Call me after you have had a chance to read. If okay, I will print on letterhead so that it can be resent to the counterparty.
